subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! Thy letter was received, and the plunder and devastation of these bygone years became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی نامه شما رسید و تالان و تاراج معلوم گردید این سنین گذشته
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital
